title: rhinanthus glaber subsp. montanus
intro: Rhinanthus glaber subsp. montanus, also known as the Mountain Bee Orchid, is a perennial plant species belonging to the broomrape family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Rhinanthus glaber subsp. montanus include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a healthy immune system.
